title: Greek Feta Casserole
description: A classic Greek casserole filled with tangy feta cheese and perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Cut the pita bread into 1-inch pieces and layer them in the casserole dish.
Crumble the feta cheese and sprinkle it over the pita bread.
Drizzle the olive oil over the feta cheese and sprinkle with Greek seasoning.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with lemon wedges on the side.
